headline: Amazon Could Use JCPenney, Sears Stores As Fulfillment Centers: Report
summary: What Happened: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) is in talks with Simon Property Group Inc. (NYSE: SPG), the biggest mall owners in America, to convert some of its anchor-department store spaces into Amazon fulfilment centers,

headline: Amazon, Simon Property Group Look at Turning Sears, J.C. Penney Stores Into Fulfillment Centers
